steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase "counterintuitive effect" signals a contrast. Normally, higher prices reduce demand, but here buyers started rushing to purchase figures because they believed prices would rise further—this means the missing word must express 'causing demand.'

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
"Conversely" sets up a contrast with "historically significant," so the blank must mean the opposite — unimportant or minor. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — momentous: extremely important — synonymous with "historically significant," repeats the first option instead of contrasting it. ✗
  • Choice B — inconsequential: of little or no importance — directly contrasts "historically significant." ✓
  • Choice C — benevolent: kind and generous — describes character, not historical importance. ✗
  • Choice D — genuine: authentic — describes authenticity, not significance. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
